checks.requirement: assertedLoginIdentity is removed from the supplier URL before redirect
persistent stores never contain raw assertedLoginIdentity
checks.evidence: validator searches grant, transaction, return intent, binding, merge decision, disposition, and audit snapshots

checks.requirement: SSO endpoints emit no-store and no-referrer headers
checks.evidence: capture and callback responseHeaders include Cache-Control=no-store and Referrer-Policy=no-referrer
SSOEntryGrant.maxRedemptions is 1 and replay returns safe_reentry_required

checks.requirement: promoted drafts do not reopen mutable draft state
